title: Reports and Publications – Consumer Product Safety - Canada.ca
content:
## Reports and Publications – Consumer Product Safety
Health Canada's aim is to help keep the Canadian public safe by providing information that promotes safety and the safer use of consumer products.

## What reports and publications are available
We offer reports and publications on a variety of consumer product-related topics. These resources generally fall under the following categories:
- Industry & Professionals
- Pesticides and Pest Management

## Latest reports and publications
- Is Your Child Safe? Play Time
- Safety with Radar - Activity Books
- Infant Safe Sleep Tips for Grandparents

### Industry and professionals
- Industry Guide for the Classification of Cribs, Cradles, Bassinets and Related Products
- Industry Guide to Children's Jewellery
- Guide to Notices of Violation and Administrative Monetary Penalties under the Canada Consumer Product Safety Act
- Industry Guide to Second-hand Products (Including Children's Products)
- Canada Consumer Product Safety Act - Information for Direct Sellers (Suppliers and Independent Sales Contractors)
